action.reasoning: Observation: Previous SchNet/PyG attempts repeatedly segfaulted (exit 139, empty stdout even on early prints). Analysis: Likely torch_geometric/CUDA/torch-scatter incompatibility in env; GNN imports or DataLoader trigger it. Decision: Switch to stable CPU baseline using RDKit Morgan fingerprints (2048 bits) + sklearn RandomForestRegressor on CSV data (avoids all GNN pkgs); subsample 20k for speed, log val_mae to metrics.jsonl, save via pickle; this will give first MAE score + timing measurement quickly before iterating to full data/better models (e.g. more trees, torch MLP on fps, or fixed GNN).
